top_findings.summary: The skill description requires loading complete CORE context that includes sensitive user data such as contact lists, personal preferences, voice IDs for agent routing, and security rules. This information is unrelated to the primary purpose of document processing (creating, editing, analyzing DOCX, PDF, PPTX, XLSX files) and constitutes excessive data collection beyond what is necessary for the stated functionality.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill description requires loading complete CORE context that includes sensitive user data such as contact lists, personal preferences, voice IDs for agent routing, and security rules. This information is unrelated to the primary purpose of document processing (creating, editing, analyzing DOCX, PDF, PPTX, XLSX files) and constitutes excessive data collection beyond what is necessary for the stated functionality.
